report.summary: Day 56 standup v11 (11:08 CET): Full rotation 6/6 completed since v10. 400 PUBLISHED_PAGES in file (+2 Sui + Portfolio promoted by publish-v4, deploy HmWMpiP7u initializing — but git locks still present, production likely still cb65a9d/378 pages). Build-v8 shipped BTC LST guide ($4B+ market, 3100 words, yield estimator) → PUBLISH_QUEUE. Design-v8 fixed broken ArticleStructuredData on 2 guides, 3 missing OG refs, 5 BackToTop additions. Community-v9 deployed full FOMC T-1 content pack (5 tweet templates, newsletter, Discord, social card). FOMC decision TOMORROW 2pm ET — git locks now 23h+ stale, 566 uncommitted files, 0/6 rate limiters. Vercel trial ~8 days. 48 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v10 Standup (10:06 CET)
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 400 in published-pages.ts (+0 since v10 — publish-v4 promoted Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing to file, but git lock persists so production build still on cb65a9d / 378 live pages). Deploy HmWMpiP7u reported as 'initializing' by publish-v4 — likely a re-trigger of existing HEAD, not a new commit.

New content this cycle (build-v8): bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026 — 3,100-word intermediate guide covering Lombard LBTC (~$2B TVL, 60% market share), SolvBTC (~$1.96B TVL), pumpBTC (~$500M TVL), plus interactive BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator.tsx component. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. $4B+ total LST market, content gap filled.

Design-v8 polished 5 pages this cycle: fixed broken ArticleStructuredData props on Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing (incorrect publishedTime/author → required datePublished/dateModified/slug); replaced 3 static OG image refs pointing to nonexistent files with dynamic /api/og; fixed domain error (degen0x.io → degen0x.com) in Portfolio Rebalancing schema; added BackToTop to 5 long-scroll guides. 5 SVG social cards created (BTC LST, DAO Governance, Cross-Chain Interop, Sui, Portfolio Rebalancing).

Community-v9 FOMC T-1 content pack: 5 tweet templates ready (pre-decision, countdown, hawkish response, dovish response, 5-post thread); newsletter draft for Thu Mar 19 FOMC Reaction Edition; Discord/Telegram announcement copy; Sprint 59 feature poll (Options Chain / Whale Tracker / Pectra Countdown / DeFi Yield Aggregator); FOMC decision-day SVG social card (3 scenario panels: dovish $80-85K / base $72-77K / hawkish $65-70K). Published to /public/social-fomc-decision-day-2026.svg.

Market snapshot: BTC holding $75K+ (6-week high, +25% from Feb $60K bottom). Fear & Greed ~35 (recovering from ATL of 5 in Feb). ETF inflow streak Day 6 ($962.8M total since Mar 9). FOMC meeting UNDERWAY — decision TOMORROW Mar 18 ~2pm ET. Dot plot will be the key signal.

GSC organic signals: Day 18 of 14-21 indexing window. First impressions and clicks from Jan/Feb publish batches expected to be arriving THIS WEEK. No GSC data yet to confirm — first measurable organic traffic signal imminent.

PUBLISH_QUEUE status per publish-v4: 0 pages remaining (Sui + Portfolio cleared). Build-v8 adds bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026 back to queue — queue is at 1 pending. Rate Limiter status in publish-v4 reads 'Active' — CONTRADICTS EOD-v8 which confirms 0/6 routes wired. Discrepancy flagged; EOD-v8 is the authoritative source.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v10
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v10 ✅ — publish-v4 + build-v8 + design-v8 + community-v9 + eod-v8 all ran. Today: 48 total agent reports. v11 standup is report #49.

SHIPPED this cycle ✅ — BTC LST guide scaffolded (3,100 words + yield estimator component); 5 pages OG/structured-data fixed by design-v8; FOMC T-1 social campaign deployed by community-v9; publish-v4 promoted Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing in file (deploy HmWMpiP7u initializing). Design fixes are meaningful — broken JSON-LD schemas on 2 pages now corrected before indexing.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~23 HOURS STALE. Created Mar 16 11:17/13:06 CET. 566 uncommitted files (+10 from v10's 556 — new files from build-v8 + design-v8 SVGs + community-v9 social card). CRITICAL: The deploy HmWMpiP7u from publish-v4 is almost certainly a re-trigger of cb65a9d HEAD (378 pages), not a real new deploy. All 400 pages, BTC LST guide, FOMC guide, all structured-data fixes remain UNCOMMITTED. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock is the single unblocking action.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 — FOMC DECISION TOMORROW 2pm ET. checkRateLimit() exists in codebase, wired to ZERO API routes. EOD-v8 confirms this. Publish-v4 incorrectly reports 'Active' — treat as a reporting error. 20th+ consecutive standup flagging this. Tomorrow's FOMC traffic will hit all 6 public APIs (prices, trending, fear-greed, dominance, metrics, defi-yields) simultaneously. No protection.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026 now in PUBLISH_QUEUE — needs design polish review, then promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] ~102 slugs on dynamic [slug] route without dedicated page.tsx — unchanged from prior cycles.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename (fixes 40/42 TS errors). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true) but should be resolved.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] /api/defi-yields returns HTTP 500 on DefiLlama upstream failure with no fallback data.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] Vercel Pro trial ~8 days remaining. Payment method needed at vercel.com/account/billing before March 25.

DELTA NOTE: publish-v4 reporting inconsistency — claims Rate Limiter 'Active' and '0 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE'. EOD-v8 (authoritative infra check) confirms 0/6 rate-limited. BTC LST guide added to queue by build-v8 AFTER publish-v4 ran. Queue is 1 page as of v11.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION: REMOVE GIT LOCKS (~2 min, now 23h stale — highest urgency of any sprint). Two commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit all 566 files → push → Vercel auto-deploys 400 pages including FOMC guide, Hyperliquid guide, Sui, Portfolio Rebalancing, and all design/schema fixes. FOMC decision is tomorrow 2pm ET. Without this, we will miss the highest-traffic crypto macro event in 6 weeks with a complete content arsenal already built and sitting uncommitted. Every hour of delay is compounding opportunity cost.

PRIORITY 2 — WIRE RATE LIMITERS BEFORE FOMC (agent task, ~30 min): Apply checkRateLimit() to all 6 API routes before tomorrow 14:00 ET. FOMC traffic will spike all routes simultaneously — /api/prices and /api/trending are the highest-risk. This is the 20th consecutive standup flagging this. After git unlock, the programmer agent can patch all 6 routes in a single build cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — DEPLOY + VERIFY + VERCEL BILLING: After git unlock and commit, confirm production shows 400 pages (not 378 from cb65a9d). Check HmWMpiP7u or the new deploy triggered by the commit — ensure FOMC guide, Hyperliquid, Sui, and Portfolio pages are all live and indexable before FOMC decision. Separately: Jefe verifies Vercel billing at vercel.com/account/billing to confirm trial status and add payment method now, not closer to March 25.

STRATEGIC NOTE — This is the most consequential moment of the degen0x sprint cycle to date. BTC at $75K+ (6-week high), F&G recovering, 6-day ETF inflow streak, FOMC meeting underway with dot plot tomorrow. We have a FOMC guide, Hyperliquid guide, Sui guide, Portfolio Rebalancing guide, BTC LST guide, and a full social campaign — ALL sitting in the local filesystem, uncommitted. The production site is on a 23-hour-old stale deploy. The entire content machine has produced zero live output today. A 2-minute terminal command unlocks everything.
